name: Texas Workforce Commission - Child Care Services (Tarrant County)
eligibility: Income-eligible families, must be working or in approved training
notes: Apply through Workforce Solutions for Tarrant County. Processing typically 2-4 weeks. Covers licensed centers and registered homes.

name: Head Start of Greater Tarrant County (Child Care Associates)
address: 3000 S Hulen St, Fort Worth, TX 76109
eligibility: Families at or below federal poverty level, children ages 0-5
notes: Free program. Also serves pregnant women. Apply early, waitlists common.

name: Texas DFPS - Child Care Licensing (Tarrant County)
address: Tarrant County DFPS Office, 6300 John Ryan Dr, Fort Worth, TX 76132
eligibility: Open to all parents and providers
notes: Use the DFPS public search tool to verify a provider's license status and inspection history before enrollment.

name: ACH Child and Family Services
notes: Serves children and families across Tarrant County. Sliding-scale fees on some programs.
